experience.title: Software Engineer

what_drew_you_to_this_role: I am passionate about building scalable software systems and this role aligns with my experience in full-stack development and cloud architecture.
why_this_company: The company's commitment to innovation and engineering excellence resonates with my career goals.
what_are_your_strengths: Strong problem-solving skills, experience with distributed systems, and a collaborative approach to engineering.
cover_letter_text:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in this position. With 3 years of experience in software engineering, including expertise in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies, I am confident I can contribute meaningfully to your team.

At Acme Corp, I led the migration of a legacy monolith to microservices, improving deployment velocity by 60%. I am eager to bring this same drive for engineering excellence to your organization.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Jane Smith
